title: Date Include Time
excerpt:
hello 
I’m using my Date column with Time for a Calendar view. But when my automation is activated for push date 1 day, the time value is lost and systematically set to 2:00. 
How can I fix this bug? 
Thank you for your …

posts.author: KarineFR (Estebe)
posts.cookedHtml:
hello
I’m using my Date column with Time for a Calendar view. But when my automation is activated for push date 1 day, the time value is lost and systematically set to 2:00.
How can I fix this bug?
Thank you for your help

posts.author: psperry (Accidental Selfie )
posts.cookedHtml: I don’t know about your specific situation but I know that there is a bug that has to do with dates and time zones that they are working on. Has this ever worked for you?

posts.author: KarineFR (Estebe)
posts.cookedHtml:
Je suis nouvelle utilisatrice de Monday.
Je ne peux pas dire si cela fonctionnais avant mais maintenant cela me pose problème.
